domain: Goliath frog stone-stacked nest perimeter — male frog moves 1-2kg stones into a defensive circular wall around the nest depression; many small individual contributions aggregate into a perimeter larger and tougher than any one component.
specific_mechanism: Large-N independent stones aggregated into a passive defensive perimeter; no individual stone load-bearing — defense is by union (collective barrier integrity).
llm_application: GOLIATH-PERIMETER: N independent narrow-purpose guard filters (PII, jailbreak phrases, hidden instructions, role confusion, prompt injection, etc.) arranged as a passive defensive perimeter around the main LLM input. Filters are NOT hierarchically composed; the union of their flags decides admit/reject. Large-N redundancy: compromise of any one filter still leaves the perimeter mostly intact.
novelty_claim: EPD aggregates judge + base LLM (small ensemble). Engorgio dual-layer composes initial + cumulative thresholds (2 layers serial). Production context-engineering chains filters serially. GOLIATH-PERIMETER's distinctive contribution is LARGE-N (~10-20) cheap independent filters with union-decision and individual replaceability — a stigmergy-style perimeter that explicitly trades depth for breadth.
